title: Massive sell-offs in the tech sector trigger declines in global markets
summary: Fears of an artificial intelligence bubble and concerns about interest rates unleash a wave of selling on stock exchanges in the United States, Europe, and Asia.

title: Wall Street rebounds with focus on Micron earnings
summary: U.S. indices regain ground after the recent sell-off in tech stocks, as investors await results from chip maker Micron.

title: Oil falls below pre-Iran war levels on hopes of Hormuz reopening
summary: Trump's statements that Iran will not impose tolls in the strait and expectations of smoother crude flows push Brent to lows not seen since before the conflict.

title: SpaceX: bearish bets, AI agreement, and doubts about Starship mark the news
summary: The space company faces an increase in short positions, while signing an agreement with Reflection AI and doubts arise about its Starship rocket.

title: US airline stocks rise as oil falls below $70
summary: The drop in crude oil prices boosts shares of the country's major airlines, as they see their fuel costs reduced.

title: Barclays identifies top nuclear energy stocks to power AI
summary: The investment bank points out nuclear companies that will benefit from the growing electricity demand of AI data centers.

title: Chinese audit finds tax irregularities in major banks
summary: China's state audit finds tax problems in the country's major banking entities.

title: Stitch Fix rises on stock market after launching AI-powered styling feature
summary: The online fashion platform incorporates AI into its styling service, causing a rebound in its stock price.

title: Alphabet replaces Verizon in the Dow Jones index
summary: Google's parent joins the industrial index replacing the telecommunications company, reflecting the dominance of the tech sector.

title: SpaceX places $25 billion in bonds on the market
summary: Elon Musk's space company issues bonds worth $25 billion, attracting strong investor interest.

title: Microsoft shows bearish bias in technical analysis
summary: Microsoft shares trade near 52-week lows with a bearish flag pattern suggesting further declines.

title: Tesla trapped in a downtrend with $379 support at risk
summary: Technical analysis indicates that Tesla shares could break key support and continue their decline.

title: GTA VI to boost Take-Two earnings for several years, says BTIG
summary: The release of the highly anticipated video game will generate multi-year growth in Take-Two Interactive's earnings per share.

title: X-Energy plummets after Jefferies cuts price target
summary: Shares of the nuclear energy company fall after Jefferies lowered its price target to $22.

title: Italgas falls on stock market without apparent cause
summary: Shares of the Italian gas distribution company record a significant drop during the session.

title: Sunrun surges on stock market in a bullish session
summary: Shares of the solar energy company rise sharply, driven by investor interest.

title: Rheinmetall plunges and drags down European defense companies
summary: The sharp drop in the German arms manufacturer spreads to other stocks in the sector such as Indra and other European companies.

title: The 4% rule for retirement could fail if markets repeat the 2000 crash
summary: Analysts warn that the retirement strategy based on withdrawing 4% annually may not be sufficient in a bear market scenario like the 2000s.

title: Hormuz closure leaves 1,200 ships stranded and threatens marine insurance
summary: The crisis in the Strait of Hormuz holds goods worth $125 billion and insurers foresee large losses.

title: FedEx falls on stock market due to lower margins and doubts about its freight division
summary: FedEx's results disappoint the market, with a drop in margins and concerns about the spinoff of its Freight business.
